{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Miram
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

== House of Blades ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Miram]] uses a small silver key to summon a spinning silver disc.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Miram]] is someone who tells [[Alin]] that the [[Grandmasters]] have forbidden something.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Miram shook her head sadly. “Forgive me, Eliadel. The Grandmasters have forbidden it.”<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
